## Safety checklist

- [ ] The change keeps scanning local/authorized by default.
- [ ] No exploit, brute force, MITM, spoofing, deauth, or stealth behavior was added.
- [ ] No private logs, public IPs, real names, or router exports are included.
- [ ] GUI and backend logic remain separated.

## Validation

- [ ] Built locally.
- [ ] Ran smoke test or equivalent.
